name: Slab o Scabs
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the raisins into variously sized pieces and set aside.
2. Toast the bread until golden brown.
3. Carefully place the hot toast on a plate.
4. Spread each slice of toast first with butter and then with jam.
5. Artfully arrange the torn raisin pieces on top of the jam.
6. Eat the creation.
Serves 1 wounded worshiper.
Sicko serving suggestion: Surreptitiously place a piece of torn raisin on the gauze part of a sterile, non-medicated bandage and apply it to the clean, dry appendage of your choice. Then tell your intended victim that you're so hungry you could eat a scab. Whip off the bandage and consume.
